title: foundation — Eloquent observers
description: Empty by design. Foundation ships zero domain entities (see module.json: `Ships zero domain entities — the module is entity-less on purpose`). No entities → no observers. The foundation-owned trait bindings (HasUserstamps, HasVersions, HasAudit, etc) hook Eloquent lifecycle events at the TRAIT level via boot() callbacks, not via observer classes; that's a deliberate design choice to keep the observer surface reserved for domain modules. Marker file preserved to keep the blueprint layout consistent.
